scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @nasa-fuel/server" "npm run dev -w @nasa-fuel/client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @nasa-fuel/server
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
